title: Rights Pricing Option
description: A pricing option for licensable rights. Separate from media-buy pricing options — rights pricing includes period, impression caps, overage rates, and use-type scoping.

pricing_option_id.description: Unique identifier for this pricing option. Referenced in acquire_rights and report_usage.

price.description: Price amount. Interpretation depends on model: CPM = cost per 1,000 impressions, flat_rate = fixed cost per period.

uses.description: Which rights uses this pricing option covers. A single option can bundle multiple uses (e.g., likeness + voice).

period.description: Billing period for flat_rate and time-based models

impression_cap.description: Maximum impressions included in this pricing option per period

overage_cpm.description: CPM rate applied to impressions exceeding the impression_cap

description.description: Human-readable description of this pricing option
